title: Representation of state in city courts; fees
doc_html:
§3. Representation of state in city courts; fees

            The district attorneys throughout the state shall represent the state in all criminal prosecutions before city courts constituted by law.

            They shall receive the same fees now provided by law for convictions for the same offenses in the district courts of Louisiana.
doc_text:
§3.  Representation of state in city courts; fees
The district attorneys throughout the state shall represent the state in all criminal
prosecutions before city courts constituted by law.
They shall receive the same fees now provided by law for convictions for the same
offenses in the district courts of Louisiana.
